description_long: This object is a modern, angular staircase-style ladder with two flights connected by a small landing, forming a zigzag shape. The steps are wide and appear to be made of wood, with a consistent rectangular profile. The structure is supported by a central spine, and the upper landing is bordered by a white rectangular frame, possibly acting as a guardrail or boundary. The base is set on a flat, gray platform, suggesting installation in an indoor or urban environment. The design is open, with no risers between the steps, and the overall appearance is minimalist and functional. There are no visible handrails or additional safety features.
description: A modern, zigzag staircase-style ladder with wooden steps and a white upper frame, set on a flat gray platform. The design is open and minimalist, with no visible handrails.
description_view_0: Front view showing the zigzag profile, wooden steps, and the white upper frame clearly.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the rectangular landing and the alignment of the steps.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the central spine and the open structure of the steps.
description_view_3: Opposite end view showing the steps' width and the open riser design.
